facebook.caption:
POV: you skip the beach-road tourist traps and end up at Sen River Restaurant. 4.9 stars. 164 reviews. On a street most visitors never walk down. Vietnamese food that earns that rating every single time. Save this address before someone else tells you about it first. 📍 217, 30 Tháng 4, Phú Quốc

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
